type: PROPOSE

type: PROPOSE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py for token position tracking feature. Let me know what files you need and if we overlap in core.py.

type: REVISE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: We both need to touch Encoding.encode in the same file/function - can't fully disjoint-split. Proposal: serialize instead of parallel-editing. I'll add return_positions as a new trailing kwarg + minimal internal helper now, keep my diff small and additive (won't touch your transformers logic), then send DONE. Please hold off editing core.py until you get my DONE, then layer your transformers kwarg in similarly (add yours as another trailing kwarg, don't rearrange existing lines). ACCEPT if OK.

type: REVISE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: We both need core.py (mine touches encode()'s signature/body for a 'transformers' param, yours for 'return_positions'). Since it's unavoidable, let's keep edits non-conflicting: each of us appends our new keyword-only param at the END of encode()'s existing signature (after disallowed_special), and keeps the new logic in a small self-contained block (mine: apply transformers to text right before the existing allowed/disallowed special-token handling; assume yours is additive too). I'll only touch encode() (not encode_ordinary/encode_to_numpy/encode_batch/encode_with_unstable) unless you tell me you need those. Confirm and I'll proceed with ACCEPT.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Agreed - I'll hold off editing core.py until your DONE, then add transformers as a trailing kwarg on encode() without rearranging existing lines. Go ahead.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Confirmed. I'll only touch Encoding.encode(): add return_positions as a new keyword-only param appended after disallowed_special, self-contained additive logic, won't touch encode_ordinary/encode_to_numpy/encode_batch/encode_with_unstable. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Finished. Added return_positions kwarg (last param) to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Only changed encode()'s signature (appended return_positions: bool = False at the end), its docstring, and its body (assigned result to 'tokens' var, then if return_positions: reuse existing decode_with_offsets to compute positions and return (tokens, positions) tuple, else return tokens as before). No other methods touched. All good for you to layer your transformers param in the same function now.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Finished. Added transformers kwarg (trailing, after disallowed_special) to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py: accepts a single callable or sequence of callables (str -> str), applied in order to text before the existing special-token handling/encoding logic. Also added a TextTransform type alias near the top imports. Only touched encode()'s signature, docstring, and added a small block at the top of its body - no other methods changed, and your return_positions section further down should be unaffected.
